name: Vivi
bio:
Once dreamed of becoming a Demon Hunter, but was turned into a vampire. Under Celestia's guidance, he accepted his new identity and fights with Flaming Dual Blades and Vampire Magic.

Role: Physical AOE
Specialty: A backline Blitz-type hero that prioritizes dealing massive single-target damage to Control-type heroes; triggers Invincibility when taking a lethal hit.

skillSlots.name: Crimson Frenzy Dance
skillSlots.description: Attacks enemy column with most targets for 150% P.DMG.

skillSlots.name: Crimson Lotus Blink
skillSlots.description: Attacks enemy column with most targets for 197% P.DMG.
